inscriptions.text: Im gone home and its ok
Pray for us until we join you
Strong and constant is my love!
My Heart is torn between staying or going to be with the Lord
It is in dying that we are born to eternal life. – St Francis of Assisi
Relax & enjoy what God has prepared
I am torn between the two:
I desire to depart and be with Christ,
We miss  your strong & constant love
You always went the extra mile for everyone
